creator: polyduekes@proton.me
text:
(In reply to Emanuel Haupt from comment #1)
that's interesting, i wonder should i try reinstalling all the python projects in case some error procured in some pkg installation and it seems that the DNS is not the cause as i have tried after changing dns to cloudflare one as well and the output of host -t srv _http._tcp.pkg.all.freebsd.org is:-


_http._tcp.pkg.all.freebsd.org has SRV record 50 10 80 pkg0.nyi.freebsd.org.
_http._tcp.pkg.all.freebsd.org has SRV record 50 10 80 pkg0.bme.freebsd.org.
_http._tcp.pkg.all.freebsd.org has SRV record 50 10 80 pkg0.jinx.freebsd.org.
_http._tcp.pkg.all.freebsd.org has SRV record 50 10 80 pkg0.kul.freebsd.org.
_http._tcp.pkg.all.freebsd.org has SRV record 50 10 80 pkg0.tuk.freebsd.org.
_http._tcp.pkg.all.freebsd.org has SRV record 50 10 80 pkg0.sjb.freebsd.org.
_http._tcp.pkg.all.freebsd.org has SRV record 50 10 80 pkg0.pao.freebsd.org.
_http._tcp.pkg.all.freebsd.org has SRV record 50 10 80 pkg0.twn.freebsd.org.
_http._tcp.pkg.all.freebsd.org has SRV record 50 10 80 pkg0.syd.freebsd.org.
_http._tcp.pkg.all.freebsd.org has SRV record 50 10 80 pkg0.bbt.freebsd.org.
_http._tcp.pkg.all.freebsd.org has SRV record 50 10 80 pkg0.kwc.freebsd.org.

sorry to have created a bug report for a potential user error
